MallStars

Join Us

Our Vision

To inspire and nurture in the metaverse—one shopper, one creator, one decentralised journey at a time.

Experience Mallconomy’s immersive, gamified shopping experience in the metaverse, ensuring high user engagement and visibility for your business.

Join MallStar App Read our blog

What Makes Mallconomy Unique?

Metaverse is poised to revolutionize the e-commerce landscape, we cater to the digital-native Gen Z with a unique Browse-to-Earn model. Our multi-device compatibility and AI-powered sales assistance ensure an engaging and rewarding shopping experience for global visitors, signalling a new era in retail.

Malls of the Metaverse

Multidevice Compatibility

Access Mallconomy from any device, be it PCs, mobiles, or Smart TVs.

Launching DEC’24.

Store Integration

Elevate your brand with immersive Metaverse shopping. Seamlessly integrate your existing store into our hub, or craft a new, unique storefront, captivating audiences and reflecting your brand's vision within the expansive Metaverse landscape.

AI-Powered

Through Mallconomy, utilize ChatGPT-powered Ready Player Me Avatars as intelligent sales assistants within your stores, providing round-the-clock personalized support.

Browse to Earn

Brands capture customer attention and build loyalty, while visitors get rewarded for every browse and purchase. Discover a new way to shop and earn in the metaverse, making each moment spent in Mallconomy truly rewarding.

Earn from popular brands

Collaborate with your favourite brands and unlock the full potential of your Web3 e-commerce journey with Mallconomy's Rewards Hub.

Earn rewards and contribute to the success of your preferred brands by shopping through our platform. Start earning today and maximize your returns on every purchase!

Stake & Earn

Earn more from your favourite brands. Stake your NFTs to unlock faster rewards in our Rewards Hub.

Community-Driven Commerce

Embrace next-gen retail with Mallconomy, a hub of unique, globally-sourced NFTs. Here, purchases empower artists, bolster a decentralized society, and craft a collective future for e-commerce.

Affiliate

$WOOT tokens with every purchase on Mallconomy's NFT Marketplace and maximize your returns. Shop now and start earning!

Land Sale

Seize the opportunity to be an early investor in Web3 Commerce. Acquire land, rent, operate, or forge partnerships, all within the dynamic landscape of The Malls of the Metaverse.

LaunchPad

Experience a Tinder-like approach to investing in the Metaverse. Swipe right to back your favourite brands' metaverse stores , participate in collective land purchases, invest time or money. Another reason to hold a MallCard NFT.

Roadmap

H1'22STAGE 01
  • Project Initialisation
  • Website and MallStar App Launch
  • Secure Advisory Board
  • Build a community of 10K MallStars
  • Secure Tech Partnerships
H1'22STAGE 01
  • Reach to 50K registered MallStars
  • Build a community of 100K MallStars
  • Reach to 1K DAU on our App
  • Smart Contract Development
H1'23STAGE 03
  • Launch our genesis NFT collection (MallCards)
  • Metaverse Private Demo Release (ChatGPT-powered)
  • Secure Project Partnerships and Deal Flows
H1'24STAGE 04
  • Reach 100K registered MallStars
  • $WOOT Token TGE
  • Staking Release (MallBank)
  • DEX & CEX listings
  • Release our APP into Apple and Google stores
  • Land NFT Sale (Shops with Yield Bearing Perks)
H2'24STAGE 05
  • Marketplace Closed Beta Release
  • Tinder-like Launchpad Release
  • 3D Creator Studio Launch
  • Mallverse Closed Beta Release
  • Launch of Mallconomy Metaverse Shopping Mall with ChatGPT-powered AI Avatars on Smart TVs globally

Meet the $WOOT token!

Our main ecosystem currency and the native driving force to fuel our creator economy.

We are building a merit-based Web3 commerce economy with numerous in-real-life dynamics to bring a new approach to the Metaverse, with heavily diversified and sustainable revenue streams for the health of the ecosystem.

Because revenue serves as a treasury/backstop for the $WOOT token economy and the “Work.Own.Operate.Transfer” financial model.

About Us

Our Story

Born from a 90's dream to fuse gaming with economics, our aspiration was to create a digital realm where creativity, work, and fun merged into a rewarding ecosystem. With the rise of the Metaverse, we seized the opportunity to reshape e-commerce. This led to the birth of Mallconomy, a comprehensive platform fostering social equality and abundant economic possibilities..

Today, Mallconomy is not just a realization of that dream but an evolved digital reality. Transitioning from a gamer's fantasy to a Browse-to-Earn Multidevice Metaverse Hub, we are at the forefront of empowering and rewarding users through our multifaceted platform. Our scope and influence continue to expand, enhanced by innovative additions like our Launchpad and Rewards App.

In the Mallconomy universe, diverse opportunities await our vibrant community. From Proprietors operating their storefronts, busy owners entrusting their duties, to visitors immersing in the mallverse, we are a bustling, interactive, and immersive metaverse haven.

As Mallconomy's founder and CEO, I extend a warm invitation for you to join us in this groundbreaking journey. Together, we will shape the Metaverse, fostering a global community built on collaboration, creativity, and equitable rewards. At Mallconomy, we believe in potential over background. Everyone is invited to partake, earn, and play in our trailblazing digital landscape.

Our team combines a wealth of experience in product development, business operations and has an exceptional track record in building Fintech.

In total, we are a team of 29, positioned across 4 continents, with ambition to grow! We often finish each other’s sentences, lines of code and occasionally lunch, when they aren't looking of course!
